coach.def: 教練、大馬車、客車、指導(輔導課)的人的人
coach.col: football coach, coach trip, travel by coach
coach.ex: The football coach worked hard with the team tonight.

coaching.def: 教練、輔導、指導的人 (或物)
coaching.ex: Private coaching helped her to pass the difficult exam.

coachman.ex: The royal coachman drove the queen to the palace today.

coachwork.ex: The shiny coachwork of the vintage car was stunning.

coadjutor.def: 助手、助理主教的人物 (單數)
coadjutor.ex: The bishop coadjutor helped to manage the church today.

coagulant.def: 凝結劑、凝血劑人物 (單數)
coagulant.ex: Natural coagulant is essential for cheese making today.

coagulate.ex: The medicine helps the blood to coagulate faster tonight.

coagulation.ex: The rapid coagulation of the milk surprised the cook.

coal.def: 煤、煤塊、把煤裝入的人的人的人物 (單數)
coal.col: coal mine, coal fire, carry coals to Newcastle (多此一舉)
coal.ex: The family gathered around the warm coal fire tonight.

coalesce.def: 聯合、合併、接合的人的人
coalesce.ex: The two small streams coalesce into a large river tonight.

coalescence.ex: The full coalescence of the groups took several years.

coalface.ex: Our nurses work at the coalface of health care today.

coalfield.ex: The rich coalfield provides many local jobs tonight.

coalition.def: 聯盟、聯合、(政)聯盟的人物 (單數)
coalition.ex: The two small parties formed a coalition government.

coalminer.ex: The retired coalminer told stories about the old days.

coaming.ex: The raised coaming prevented water from entering cabin.

coarse.def: 粗糙的、粗俗的、粗鄙的人人物 (粗)
coarse.col: coarse language, coarse sand, coarse texture
coarse.ex: The beach was covered in very coarse and golden sand.

coarsely.ex: The vegetables should be chopped coarsely for soup.

coarsen.def: 變粗糙、使粗俗的人的人
coarsen.ex: Hard outdoor work began to coarsen his soft skin.

coast.def: 海岸、沿海地區、滑行的人的人 (或物)
coast.col: the coast is clear (平安無事), east coast, along the coast
coast.ex: We drove for several hours along the beautiful coast.

coastal.def: 海岸的、沿海的的人的人物
coastal.ex: Many coastal towns were damaged by the strong storm.

coaster.def: 杯墊、沿海船、(口)雲霄飛車的人物 (單數)
coaster.ex: Please put your wet and cold glass on a clean coaster.

coastguard.ex: The coastguard rescued the modern sailors tonight.

coastline.ex: The rugged coastline was truly beautiful and quiet.

coat.def: 外套、大衣、(油漆)層、塗的人的人物
coat.col: winter coat, coat of paint, sugar-coated
coat.ex: She put on her heavy and warm winter coat tonight.

coating.def: 塗層、覆蓋層、上衣的人 (或物)
coating.ex: The metal part has a special protective coating today.

coax.ex: They managed to coax the cat down from the high tree.

coaxial.def: 同軸的、共軸的人的人物
coaxial.ex: The television was connected with a coaxial cable.

coaxing.ex: After some soft coaxing, the child finally smiled.

cob.def: 玉蜀黍心、天鵝(雄)、矮種馬的人物 (單數)
cob.ex: We enjoyed sweet and fresh corn on the cob tonight.

cobalt.def: 鈷、深藍色、鈷類的人的人物 (鈷)
cobalt.ex: She wore a stunning dress of bright cobalt blue silk.

cobber.ex: G'day cobber, how have you been doing lately tonight?

cobble.def: 鵝卵石、粗修、補(鞋)的人的人
cobble.ex: They had to cobble together a plan at last minute.

cobbler.def: 補鞋匠、水果派、(俚)廢話的人物 (單數)
cobbler.ex: The local shoemaker was a very skilled old cobbler.
